response.justification: While Bogdan has an exceptional technical background with over 15 years of experience and a strong focus on engineering productivity, developer tools, and testing infrastructure, he lacks the fundamental requirement for this role: people management. Because this is a Level II Manager position prioritizing full-time people leadership, his purely individual contributor and technical leadership background makes him an unsuitable fit for this specific management track.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience, significantly exceeding the 8-year minimum requirement.
Strong background in engineering productivity, including CI/CD, test automation, and building developer tools.
Relevant mobile platform knowledge gained from developing iOS applications and mobile orchestration tools.
concerns: Completely lacks the required 2+ years of formal people management experience.
No demonstrated history of setting organizational performance expectations or conducting regular one-on-ones.
Does not meet the preferred qualification of leading organizational change at a management level.
